chatPlus.linePriority.tooltip: Priority of line colors from (Hover/Bookmark/Highlight/etc). The priority with the lowest number will be rendered on top.
key.peekChat.tooltip: Hold this key to peek the chat. The chat will be shown while the key is held outside of the chat screen.
key.speechToText.ptt.tooltip: Hold down the key for the model to listen.
key.speechToText.quickSend.tooltip: Press this key shortly after finishing speaking to instantly send the message.
chatPlus.title: ChatPlus
chatPlus.chatSettings.title: Chat Settings
chatPlus.chatSettings.tooltip: Change chat settings similar to vanilla Minecraft.
chatPlus.chatSettings.globalizedConfig.t: Enables/Disables the cloth config globalized config option, best to see for yourself what it does.
chatPlus.chatSettings.addMessagesIfDisab: Enables/Disables adding messages to the ChatPlus chat if ChatPlus is disabled.
chatPlus.chatSettings.showVanillaWhenUnf: Enables/Disables showing the vanilla chat when unfocused.
chatPlus.vanillaInputBox.toggle.tooltip: Enables/Disables using the vanilla input box appearance.
chatPlus.saveInputBoxMessage.toggle.tool: Enables/Disables the input box prepopulating with the message it contained the last time you closed the chat.
chatPlus.chatSettings.wrappedMessageLine:
Indentation of wrapped message lines.
This may cause some lines to overflow the width of the chat box.
chatPlus.chatSettings.maxMessages.toolti:
The maximum number of messages to store. Minecraft's default is 100. Increasing this will increase memory usage.
 
Values less than 1 = Unlimited messages stored.
chatPlus.chatSettings.maxCommandSuggesti: The maximum number of commands to suggest. Minecraft's default is 10. The suggestions might go past your screen height.
The position of the message when jumping to it.
chatPlus.chatSettings.selectChat.color.t: The color of chat lines when they are selected.
Format of the timestamp, close the format in {}, and use & to specify color codes.
Ex. {HH:mm:ss}
 
Uses current time zone.
 
Symbol  Meaning                                Presentation      Examples
-----  -------                                ------------    -------
G         era                                     text                  AD; Anno Domini; A
u         year                                    year                2004; 04
y         year-of-era                          year                2004; 04
D         day-of-year                          number             189
M/L      month-of-year                       number/text       7; 07; Jul; July; J
d         day-of-month                         number             10
 
Q/q      quarter-of-year                    number/text       3; 03; Q3; 3rd quarter
Y         week-based-year                    year                1996; 96
w         week-of-week-based-year        number              27
W         week-of-month                        number             4
E         day-of-week                          text                 Tue; Tuesday; T
e/c      localized day-of-week              number/text       2; 02; Tue; Tuesday; T
F         week-of-month                        number             3
 
a         am-pm-of-day                        text                  PM
h         clock-hour-of-am-pm (1-12)      number              12
K         hour-of-am-pm (0-11)              number              0
k         clock-hour-of-am-pm (1-24)      number              0
 
H         hour-of-day (0-23)                 number              0
m         minute-of-hour                       number              30
s         second-of-minute                    number              55
S         fraction-of-second                 fraction             978
A         milli-of-day                            number              1234
n         nano-of-second                     number               987654321
N         nano-of-day                          number              1234000000

The mode of the timestamp.
 
§nHover:§r
Hover over the message to see the timestamp.
 
§nPrepend:§r
Prepend the timestamp to the message.
 
§nAppend:§r
Append the timestamp to the message.
chatPlus.chatSettings.inputBoxSettings.n: Enables/Disables normalizing the input box text while typing. Removes leading and trailing whitespace and replaces sequences of whitespace characters with a single space. This is automatically done before you send a message and server side.
chatPlus.chatSettings.inputBoxSettings.m: The maximum number of characters that can be entered in the input box. Minecraft's default is 256.
chatPlus.chatSettings.inputBoxSettings.s: Enables/Disables showing the current character count in the input box on the top right.
The background color of the character count in the input box.
chatPlus.chatSettings.inputBoxSettings.i: Enables/Disables auto filling the input box upon next chat open if the previous message overflowed.
Only cycle auto fill when entered was used to close the chat (sent message, chat not closed by escape/etc). Otherwise auto fill will cycle if chat is closed by any means.
Clear the auto fill queue if the chat is closed with an empty input box.

How auto fill interacts when opening the chat with command/slash.
 
Ignore: Ignore the command and auto fill.
Skip: Auto fill the next non command.
Clear: Clear the auto fill queue.

How new auto fill messages are added to the queue when the queue is already populated.
 
Overwrite: Overwrite the current queue.
Prepend: Add to the front of the queue.
Append: Add to the end of the queue.
chatPlus.chatSettings.messageImagePrevie: Enables/Disables showing image previews in chat. Control right click to load the image.
The background color of messages with image previews.
chatPlus.chatSettings.debugLogging.toolt: Enables/Disables debug logging to your logs.
chatPlus.hideChat.title: Hide Chat
chatPlus.hideChat.showWhenFocused.toggle: If hide chat is enabled, this will show the chat when it is focused.
chatPlus.hideChat.hideWhenDebugScreen.to: Enables/Disables hiding the chat when the debug (F3) screen is shown.
chatPlus.hideChat.showHiddenOnScreen.tog: If the chat is hidden then 'Chat Hidden' will be displayed on the top center of the screen.
chatPlus.hideChat.key.tooltip: Shortcut to toggle hiding the chat.
chatPlus.hideChat.alwaysShowChat.key.too: Shortcut to always show the chat.
chatPlus.compactMessages.title: Compact Messages
chatPlus.compactMessages.toggle.tooltip: Enables/Disables if messages should be compacted
chatPlus.compactMessages.format.tooltip: Format of the compacted message indicator. Include %VALUE% as the placeholder for the amount of times the message was compacted, and use & to specify color codes.
chatPlus.compactMessages.compactMessages: Enables/Disables if new message should send as a new message with its compact counter.
Enables/Disables if the new message should delete its duplicate, only applies if Send as New is enabled.
chatPlus.compactMessages.refreshFadeTime: Enables/Disables whether or not the fade timer of newly compacted messages are reset if not sent as a new message.
chatPlus.compactMessages.mode.tooltip:
How to decide when to compact messages.
 
§nLatest:§r
Compact with any matching message within the search amount, regardless of time.
 
§nTime:§r
Only compact with matching messages that appeared within the Time Window (Seconds).
chatPlus.compactMessages.searchAmount.to: The amount of previous messages to search when compacting messages. 1 = only compact consecutive messages.
chatPlus.compactMessages.timeSeconds.too: When using Time mode, only compact messages that appeared within this many seconds of each other. Used only when Compact Mode is Time.
The mode of the comparator when comparing messages.
 
Vanilla: Uses vanilla comparator.
Custom: Uses custom comparator with below settings.
chatPlus.compactMessages.comparatorSetti: Customize how messages are compared to be compacted.
chatPlus.compactMessages.compactMessageS: Enables/Disables whether or not timestamps are ignored when matching messages to compact. Compacted messages will have their timestamps updated. Only applies if Timestamp Mode is not set to NONE.
Enables/Disables comparing the contents of messages.

Enables/Disables comparing the style of messages using the below settings.
 
Note: Messages may appear identical but are represented differently internally causing them to not compact.
Components must have the same color.
Components must both be striked through.
Components must both have the same click event.
Components must both have the same hover event.

Components must both have the same insertion string.
(Inserts text in input box by shift clicking messages)
Components must both have the same font.
chatPlus.scrolling.title: Scrolling
chatPlus.scrolling.noScrollKey.tooltip: Hold this key to disable scrolling. Created for scrolling through large chat hover messages with scrollable tooltips.
chatPlus.scrolling.fineScrollKey.tooltip: Hold this key to scroll 1 line at a time. (Default 7 lines per scroll)
chatPlus.scrolling.largeScrollKey.toolti: Hold this key to scroll 21 lines at a time. (Default 7 lines per scroll)
chatPlus.peekChat.scrolling.toggle.toolt: Enables/Disables scrolling while peeking the chat. This prevents scrolling through your hotbar.
chatPlus.animation.title: Animation
chatPlus.animation.disableOnFocus.toolti: Disable animations when the chat is focused.
chatPlus.animation.newMessageTransitionT: The time it takes for a new message to transition in.
chatPlus.chatWindowsTabs.title: Chat Windows/Tabs
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.disa: Enables/Disables the rendering the whole chat window, even when focused.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.back: Background color of the chat window.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.unfo: Reduces the opacity of the chat background when this window is not selected by the supplied amount.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.redu: When enabled, also applies the unfocused background opacity reduction when the chat screen is closed (even if this window was last selected).
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.unfo: Reduces the opacity of the chat outline when this window is not selected by the supplied amount.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.redu: When enabled, also applies the unfocused outline opacity reduction when the chat screen is closed (even if this window was last selected).
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.chat: Changes the chat text size. This does not effect width/height.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.text: Changes the opacity of the chat text.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.unfo: Reduces the opacity of the chat text when the chat is unfocused by the supplied amount.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.redu: When enabled, also applies the unfocused text opacity reduction when the chat screen is closed (even if this window was last selected).
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.unfo: Changes the height of the chat when it is unfocused. Percent is based on focused height.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.line: Changes the spacing between lines of text in chat.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.mess: The direction in which chat lines are rendered
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.topD: Enables/Disables if wrapped messages should display as bottom up.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.anch: The screen corner the chat window's position is anchored to when the GUI scale changes. The distance from the anchor corner to the corresponding corner of the chat window is maintained on resize.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.text: Enables/Disables the shadow effect of text.
chatPlus.chatWindow.outlineSettings.outl: Enables/Disables the outline of the chat window.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.show: Enables/Disables showing the outline when the chat is not open.
chatPlus.chatWindow.generalSettings.rese: Enables/Disables if the scroll position should be reset when the chat is closed.
chatPlus.chatWindow.outlineSettings.outl: Outline color of the chat window when focused.
The type of outline to use around the chat box.
The type of outline to use around the chat tabs.
chatPlus.chatWindow.padding.left.tooltip: Left padding of the text within the chat box.
chatPlus.chatWindow.padding.right.toolti: Right padding of the text within the chat box.
chatPlus.chatWindow.padding.bottom.toolt:
Bottom padding of the text within the chat box.
 
May cause problems.
chatPlus.chatWindow.tabSettings.hideTabs: Enables/Disables hides the tabs in the chat window, this also prevents them from being moved/clicked.
chatPlus.chatWindow.tabSettings.showTabs: Show Tabs When Chat Not Open
Enables/Disables showing the tabs when the chat is not open.
chatPlus.chatWindow.tabSettings.position: The position of the chat tabs relative to the chat window.
chatPlus.chatWindow.tabSettings.unfocuse: Reduces the opacity of the chat tabs when the chat is unfocused by the supplied amount.
chatPlus.chatWindow.tabSettings.tabTextC: The text color of the selected tab.
The text color of the unselected tabs.
chatPlus.chatWindow.tabSettings.chatTabs: Enables/Disables right clicking tabs to open the tab its respective editor screen.
Enables/Disables SHIFT right clicking any tab to open its respective window editor screen instead of the tab editor screen.
Enables/Disables scrolling left/right to cycle through tabs.
Key to scroll to the previous tab.
Key to scroll to the next tab.
Key to scroll to the previous tab when the chat is closed.
Key to scroll to the next tab when the chat is closed.
Input Box Auto Adjust Chat Window
Enables/Disables auto moving the chat window above/below the input box if they overlap when opening the chat.
chatPlus.chatWindowsTabs.tabNotification: Enables/Disables showing the number of unread messages in the tab notification badge.
The color of the unread message count in the tab notification badge.
Scale of the tab notification badge.
chatPlus.chatWindow.tabSettings.chatTabs: Enables/Disables moving to the next tab when cycling through tabs.
Tab setting used depends on if current server matches the pattern. Leave empty to apply to all servers.
Regex Pattern. Must match entire message. For example, matching anything that contains 'hello' would be '.*hello.*'.
Whether to use the formatted message or the raw message.
Text to auto send when switching to this tab.
Priority of the tab. When adding messages, tabs are sorted by highest priority first. By default, if a message got added to a tab, tabs with a lower priority will be skipped.
Always add messages to this tab regardless of priority, this tab's priority is also ignored.
Skip other tabs if this tab is matched. Overrides Always Add.
If enabled, auto prefix will not be prepended to sent commands.
Regex Pattern for filtering command/argument suggestions.
Regex Pattern for matching the current input box, if matched the suggestion matcher will be applied for suggestion. Must match entire input.
Regex Pattern for filtering command/argument suggestions (what appears when you press tab). Must match entire input.

Mode of the suggestion matcher.
 
§nFilter:§r
Only show suggestions that match the suggestion pattern.
 
§nSort:§r
Sort suggestions so that suggestions that match the suggestion pattern appear first.
Enables/Disables disabling notifications from showing, overrides the default notification setting.
If not empty, notifications will only show if this Regex Pattern is matched. Must match entire message. For example, matching anything that contains 'hello' would be '.*hello.*'.
Whether to use the formatted message or the raw message.
If enabled, this tab will be removed when the game is closed.
chatPlus.chatWindow.autoTabCreator.title: Auto Tab Creator
chatPlus.chatWindow.autoTabCreator.autoT: Skip matching other tabs if this regex is matched.

Regex Pattern. Can match any portion of the message.
 
Use %PLAYER% to reference the player name.
Whether to use the formatted message or the raw message.

The regex pattern of the newly created tab.
 
Use %GROUP_X%, where X is the group number, to reference the group matched from the auto tab pattern..
 
Use %PLAYER% to reference the player name.

The name of the newly created tab.
 
Use %GROUP_X%, where X is the group number, to reference the group matched from the auto tab pattern..
 
Use %PLAYER% to reference the player name.

The auto send of the newly created tab.
 
Use %GROUP_X%, where X is the group number, to reference the group matched from the auto tab pattern..
 
Use %PLAYER% to reference the player name.

The auto prefix of the newly created tab.
 
Use %GROUP_X%, where X is the group number, to reference the group matched from the auto tab pattern..
 
Use %PLAYER% to reference the player name.
The priority of the newly created tab. When adding messages, tabs are sorted by highest priority first. By default, if a message got added to a tab, tabs with a lower priority will be skipped.
Always add messages to the newly created tab regardless of priority, the tab's priority is also ignored.
Skip other tabs if this newly created tab is matched. Overrides Always Add.
If enabled, auto prefix will not be prepended to sent commands in the newly created tab.
Regex Pattern for filtering command/argument suggestions.

Regex Pattern for the newly created tab matching the current input box, if matched the suggestion matcher will be applied for suggestion. Must match entire input.
 
Use %GROUP_X%, where X is the group number, to reference the group matched from the auto tab pattern..
 
Use %PLAYER% to reference the player name.

Regex Pattern for the newly created tab filtering command/argument suggestions (what appears when you press tab). Must match entire input.
 
Use %GROUP_X%, where X is the group number, to reference the group matched from the auto tab pattern..
 
Use %PLAYER% to reference the player name.

Mode of the suggestion matcher of the newly created tab.
 
§nFilter:§r
Only show suggestions that match the suggestion pattern.
 
§nSort:§r
Sort suggestions so that suggestions that match the suggestion pattern appear first.
If enabled, the newly created tab will not have notifications shown.

If not empty, notifications will only show if the Regex Pattern of the newly created tab is matched. Must match entire message. For example, matching anything that contains 'hello' would be '.*hello.*'.
 
Use %GROUP_X%, where X is the group number, to reference the group matched from the auto tab pattern..
 
Use %PLAYER% to reference the player name.
Whether to use the formatted message or the raw message.
If enabled, the newly created tab will be removed when the game is closed.
chatPlus.movableChat.title: Movable Chat
chatPlus.movableChat.toggle.tooltip:
Enables/Disables making the chat movable.
 
Click and drag the chat/tab to move it.
 
Click and drag the top edge/right edge/top right corner of the chat to rescale it.
chatPlus.movableChat.showEnabledOnScreen: If the chat is movable, 'Chat Movable' will be displayed on the top center of the screen.
chatPlus.movableChat.toggleKey.tooltip: Shortcut to toggle moving/rescaling the chat.
chatPlus.movableChat.color.tooltip: Color of clickable region to resize the chat when movable chat is enabled.
chatPlus.movableChat.selectedColor.toolt: Selected color of clickable region to resize the chat when movable chat is enabled.
chatPlus.movableChat.textBarElement.togg: Movable Chat Toggle Text Bar Element
Adds/Removes the movable chat text bar element (Box with 'M' to the right of input box) that toggles movable chat.
chatPlus.movableChat.allowWindowsOutside: When enabled, chat windows can be moved and resized outside the visible screen area.
chatPlus.sendNote.title: Send Note
chatPlus.sendNote.toggle.tooltip: Enables/Disables sending notes to the chat.
chatPlus.sendNote.key.tooltip: Shortcut to send a note to the chat.
chatPlus.sendNote.clickMode.tooltip:
The mode of clicking messages to send as a note.
 
§nSend:§r
Send the message.
 
§nCopy:§r
Copy the message.
 
§nOverride Input:§r
Override the input box with the message.
 
§nAppend Input:§r
Append the message to the input box.
chatPlus.sendNote.selectMode.tooltip:
The mode of selecting messages to send as a note.
 
§nWhole Message:§r
Select the whole message (for wrapped messages).
 
§nLine:§r
Select the line of the message.
chatPlus.sendNote.selectKey.tooltip: When selecting a message with this key down, use the other select mode.
chatPlus.sendNote.selectModeKey.tooltip: Alternative select mode used when key is down.
Adds/Removes the send note text bar element (Box with 'N' to the right of input box).
chatPlus.sendNote.textBarElement.tooltip: Click to send the input as a note. Notes are only viewable to you. Use & for coloring.
Whether to use the formatted message or the raw message. Use & for color codes.
chatPlus.messageFilter.title: Filter Highlights
chatPlus.messageFilter.tooltip: Customize what messages are highlighted in chat.
chatPlus.messageFilter.toggle.tooltip: Enables/Disables the highlighting filter messages in chat.
chatPlus.messageFilter.pattern.tooltip: Regex Pattern (Based on Raw Message, No style/formatting). Must match entire message. For example, matching anything that contains 'hello' would be '.*hello.*'.
chatPlus.messageFilter.changeColor.toggl: Enables/Disables changing the background line color of the message.
Enables/Disables playing a sound when a message is matched.
chatPlus.hoverHighlight.title: Hover Highlight
chatPlus.hoverHighlight.toggle.tooltip: Enables/Disables highlighting the message line your mouse is over.
chatPlus.hoverHighlight.mode.tooltip:
The mode of the hover highlight.
 
Brighter will make the message background brighter.
 
Custom Color will use the custom color.
chatPlus.hoverHighlight.color.tooltip: The color of the hover highlight if mode is Custom Color.
chatPlus.bookmark.title: Bookmark Messages
chatPlus.bookmark.color.tooltip: The background color of the bookmarked messages.
chatPlus.bookmark.key.tooltip: Bookmarks currently selected messages or message hovered over.
chatPlus.bookmark.textBarElement: Click to toggle showing bookmarked messages.
Adds/Removes the find message text bar element (Box with 'B' to the right of input box).
chatPlus.bookmark.show.key.tooltip: Shortcut to toggling showing bookmarked messages. If it is the same as the bookmark key, this will only work when used not hovering over a chat line.
chatPlus.bookmark.auto.title: Auto Bookmark
chatPlus.bookmark.auto.pattern.tooltip: Regex Pattern to automatically bookmark messages. Must match entire message. For example, matching anything that contains 'hello' would be '.*hello.*'.
chatPlus.findMessage.title: Find Message
chatPlus.findMessage.highlightInputBox.t: Enables/Disables highlighting the input box when finding messages is active.

Left-Click to toggle the default find mode.
 
Right-Click to toggle the alternative find mode.
 
After filtering, click on any message to jump to it.
chatPlus.findMessage.highlightMatchedTex: Enables/Disables highlighting the matched text/regex in the input box.
chatPlus.findMessage.ignoreCase.toggle.t: Enables/Disables ignoring case when finding messages.
chatPlus.findMessage.key.tooltip:
Shortcut to toggling finding message.
Press shift to toggle the alternative find mode.
chatPlus.findMessage.textBarElement.defa:
The default mode of the find message.
 
§nRegex:§r
Uses regex to find messages.
 
§nContains:§r
Uses contains to find messages.
chatPlus.findMessage.textBarElement.togg: Adds/Removes the find message text bar element (Box with 'F' to the right of input box).
chatPlus.copyMessage.title: Copy Message
chatPlus.copyMessage.copyWholeMessage.to: Enables/Disables whether or not copying a line copies the whole message associated with it.
chatPlus.copyMessage.noFormatting.toggle:
Enables/Disables copying the formatting (ChatPlus style). Using shift while copying will copy using the other mode (formatted/unformatted). Useful for creating formatted patterns as they use the same ChatPlus style syntax.
# = COLOR
&l = BOLD
&o = ITALIC
&n = UNDERLINE
&m = STRIKETHROUGH
&k = OBFUSCATED
chatPlus.copyMessage.key.tooltip: Copies currently selected messages or message hovered over.
chatPlus.copyMessage.formattingSymbolOve: String to replace section symbol when copying formatted messages. Leave empty for section symbol.
chatPlus.copyMessage.separator.tooltip: Separator to use when copying multiple messages.
chatPlus.deleteMessage.title: Delete Message
chatPlus.deleteMessage.key.tooltip:
Deletes currently selected messages or message hovered over.
 
Note: Deleting a wrapped message will delete the whole wrapped message.
chatPlus.deleteMessage.f3DMode.tooltip:
The mode of deleting messages when using F3+D.
 
§nDisabled:§r
Disables deleting messages with F3+D.
 
§nSelected Tab:§r
Deletes messages in the currently selected tab.
 
§nSelected Window:§r
Deletes messages in all tabs of the currently selected window.
 
§nAll:§r
Deletes messages in all tabs of all windows.
chatPlus.screenshotChat.title: Screenshot Chat
chatPlus.screenshotChat.tooltip:
Left-Click to take a screenshot of the currently selected chat.

Right-Click to take a screenshot of all chat windows.

3s Cooldown.
chatPlus.screenshotChat.toggle.tooltip: Enables/Disables being able to take a screenshot of the chat.
chatPlus.screenshotChat.scale.tooltip: The scale of the screenshot, 200 is 2x scale.
chatPlus.screenshotChatCopyToClipboard.t: Enables/Disables copying the screenshot to the clipboard.
chatPlus.screenshotChatSaveToFile.toggle: Enables/Disables saving the screenshot to the screenshots folder.
chatPlus.screenshotChatAutoUpload.toggle: Enables/Disables auto uploading screenshots to imgur.
chatPlus.screenshotChatAutoUploadSetting: Enables/Disables anonymous upload to imgur. Disabling means uploaded images are saved to your account.
If using anonymous upload, put your Client ID here, otherwise put your Bearer Token (Access Token) here. See wiki for more info.
chatPlus.screenshotChat.key.tooltip: Takes a screenshot of the currently selected messages or message hovered over or whole chat.
chatPlus.screenshotMode.tooltip:
Default Screenshot Mode when using shortcut.
 
§nCurrent Window:§r
Only screenshot the current window.
 
§nAll Windows:§r
Screenshot all windows.
chatPlus.screenshotBackgroundMode.toolti:
Default Screenshot Background Mode when using shortcut.
 
§nKeep Background:§r
Uses background color of the chat.
 
§nKeep Background + Show Line Color:§r
Uses background color of the chat and shows custom line colors.
 
§nTransparent:§r
Background is completely transparent.
 
§nShow Line Color:§r
Shows custom line color background from highlight/bookmark/select/etc.
chatPlus.screenshotScreenShotWindowsMode:
Default Screenshot Windows Mode when using shortcut. Used when screenshotting multiple windows.
 
§nStack:§r
Chats are stacked vertically.
 
§nSplit:§r
Chats are stacked horizontally.
chatPlus.screenshotChatTextBarElement.to: Enables/Disables the screenshot text bar element (Box with 'S' to the right of input box).
chatPlus.playerHeadChatDisplay.title: Player Head Chat Display
chatPlus.playerHeadChatDisplayEnabled.to: Enables/Disables showing player heads next to chat messages.
chatPlus.playerHeadChatDisplayShowOnWrap: Enables/Disables showing player heads on wrapped messages.
chatPlus.playerHeadChatDisplayOffsetNonH: Enables/Disables offsetting non-head messages as if they were head messages.
Enables/Disables offsetting non-head messages on wrapped messages.
chatPlus.translator.title: Translator
chatPlus.translator.match.tooltip: Regex Pattern that matches chat messages to translate.
chatPlus.translatorTextBarElement.toggle: Enables/Disables the translate text bar element with the language to translate to.
chatPlus.translator.senderNameGroupIndex: Group index of the sender's name in the regex pattern.
chatPlus.translator.translateFrom.toolti: Language to translate from. Helpful if Auto Detect can't detect the language but you know.
chatPlus.translator.translateSelf.toolti: Language to use when translating your own messages.
chatPlus.translator.translateSpeak.toolt: Language your messages are translated to.
Language your messages are translated to.
Left-Click to toggle.
Right-Click to toggle language selector.
chatPlus.translator.translateSpeakPrefix: Text to prepend that will not get translated.
chatPlus.translator.keepOnAfterChatClose: Keep Translate on After Chat Close
Enables/Disables whether the translator should automatically be on after closing the chat with it on.
chatPlus.translator.translateKey.tooltip: Shortcut to open chat with the translator automatically on.
chatPlus.translator.translateToggleKey.t: Shortcut to toggle the translator while the chat is open.
chatPlus.translator.translateClick.toggl: Enables/Disables control left clicking on currently selected messages or message hovered over. This will translate the whole message (unwrapped).
chatPlus.speechToText.toInputBox.toggle: Auto Add Message to Input Box
Enables/Disables automatically adding non quick sent speech to text messages to the input box.
chatPlus.speechToText.speechToTextSample: Sample rate of the audio. Must match the sample rate of your microphone.
chatPlus.speechToText.microphone.tooltip: The microphone to use for speech to text.
chatPlus.speechToText.selectedAudioModel: Audio model to use for speech to text.
chatPlus.speechToText.speechToTextCharse:
Charset of the text to convert UTF-8. Change if some characters are not recognized properly.
 
Examples: ISO-8859-1, UTF-8, UTF-16, US-ASCII, etc.
chatPlus.speechToText.speechToTextTransl: Enables/Disables auto translating speech to text messages.
Auto Add Translated Message to Input Box
Enables/Disables automatically adding non quick sent translated speech to text messages to the input box.
Language to translate speech to text messages to.
chatPlus.speechToText.autoReplacePlayers:
Enables/Disables automatically replacing 'player x y z ...' with any player names found containing x/y/z.
Ex. 'hello player cool how are you' -> 'hello CoolGuy57 how are you' (CoolGuy57 is a player in the world).
How many words following 'player' to search to break the tie between multiple matches.
chatPlus.speechToText.speechToText.repla:
Regex Pattern.
 
Note: This will match and replace already replaced text.
Replaces whatever the regex pattern matches.
Priority of the replace pattern. Higher priority patterns will be replaced first.
